category_sources: Official project homepage describes yetris as a customizable Tetris clone for the console.
source_facts.description says it is a customizable Tetris for the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage title is yetris.
docs_sources: Official project homepage provides installation, feature, screenshot, and contact sections.
